jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Gati
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gati family as a Fleet Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
